2025.personalBaseIncomeNote: Management fee (T4A) — pre-tax personal income used as baseline

bankAccounts.name: Simplii Chequing
bankAccounts.notes: Minimum held balance during hawl year

bankAccounts.name: TD Joint Chequing
bankAccounts.notes: Minimum held balance during hawl year

bankAccounts.name: TD Corp Chequing
bankAccounts.notes: Corp account — zakatable portion after estimated tax

bankAccounts.name: Nano Corp Chequing
bankAccounts.notes: Nano Corp account — zakatable portion after estimated tax

corpIncomeAdjustments.name: Main Corp (Ontario CCPC)
corpIncomeAdjustments.notes: Revenue $181,120 - expenses $77,374 - corp tax $36,152 = $67,594 net. This is what would flow to you after corp tax. Adjust share % if split among shareholders.

corpIncomeAdjustments.name: Nano Corp
corpIncomeAdjustments.notes: Enter Nano Corp income if applicable. Currently no active income.

investments.notes: Corp investment account. If holding individual stocks, enter debt ratio per company to calculate zakatable portion. For index funds/ETFs with mixed companies, use ~30% debt ratio as estimate.
USD holdings in corp account. Market value × FX rate = CAD equivalent. Debt ratio 0% if cash/GICs, or enter company debt ratio for stocks.
Scholars differ on RRSP: (1) pay zakat on full value yearly, (2) pay only on withdrawal, (3) pay on estimated after-tax value. Conservative approach = pay yearly on full value.
TFSA — most scholars say zakatable since you have full access.
Non-registered investment. Debt ratio 25% means 75% of market value is zakatable. Check fund holdings for actual debt ratio.

preciousMetals.notes: 18K gold = 75% purity. Enter total weight, app calculates pure gold.

receivables.description: Money owed to you (loans given, expected payments)
receivables.notes: Only include amounts you reasonably expect to collect

liabilities.notes: Outstanding CC balance at hawl date
Only deduct upcoming 12 months of payments, not total mortgage balance. Some scholars say no mortgage deduction.
